name: Hot Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Cooked, sliced potato (peeled) - about 2 medium
recipeInstructions:
2 servings, approximately 1 cup each
235 calories per serving
1. Cook bacon in a frying pan until it becomes crisp. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels. Crumble the bacon. Discard the bacon fat.
2. Cook onion in the frying pan until it becomes tender.
3. Mix flour, sugar, salt, and pepper together. Stir this mixture into the onion.
4. Gradually stir in water and vinegar. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens (about 3 minutes).
5. Add potatoes and crumbled bacon. Gently mix everything together. Heat to serving temperature over low heat for about 5 minutes.
